Module 4:
Your Pre-Prelaunch, Part 3
!
Executive Summary
Here are the results of the Testimonial Cruncher:
• 	On the “Stock Trader” product launch the feedback was excellent - this is
also because people’s “BS detector’s” are down as they’re used to
receiving content
• 	The testimonials were fantastic because we asked for feedback on the
newsletter and information we publish
This can be as basic as sending an email, asking for comments on the
content, and then watching the stats: opens, click through’s, replies
• 	Example: Generic email query - as your email list grows it can be tough
to get responses from people
At the bottom, use a P.S. - “Yes, I’m really serious - go ahead and push the
reply button now and tell me your questions. What do you need help with?”
• 	Example: Sent an email query to test for interest in a possible PLC video
topic
I told a story about how people had been saying product launches are dead
I simply explained how it’s actually quite the opposite. All of this lead to

talking about the knowledge I have of the guru product launches, which up
until this point I’d never talked about.
In general, I’d always preferred to talk about the “little guys”. At the end I
asked for an email reply to let me know if they’d be interested in learning
more about this.
The response was massive and this gave me proof that it would be a
